title: cinnagrostis curvula
intro: Cinnagrostis curvula, also known as Finger grass, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cinnagrostis curvula include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Cinnagrostis curvula is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
